summary: A functional test failed because pip could not download a GitHub archive: repeated 502 responses caused the install step to error and the test to exit with code 1.
root_cause: The test tests/functional/test_truststore.py::test_no_truststore_can_install[GitHub] failed because pip was unable to fetch the GitHub-hosted package: HTTPSConnectionPool to host='github.com' returned repeated 502 errors and max retries were exceeded, causing the install command to exit with code 1.

evidence.reason: This is the failing test identifier reported by pytest.

evidence.quote: ERROR: Could not install packages due to an OSError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='github.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /pypa/pip-test-package/archive/refs/heads/master.zip (Caused by ResponseError('too many 502 error responses'))
evidence.reason: Shows pip failed to download from GitHub due to repeated 502 responses, which explains the install failure.
The test harness reports the script exited with a non-zero status, consistent with the failed download/installation.

evidence.quote: ^[[36mnox > ^[[31mCommand pytest tests/functional --verbose --numprocesses auto --showlocals --durations=15 failed with exit code 1^[[0m
evidence.reason: The overall functional test session failed as a result of the test error.

suggested_fix: Treat this as a transient network failure: re-run the CI job. If failures recur, make the test independent of live GitHub (mock the download or use a local test server/fixture), or add handling/increased retries in test setup to avoid flaky external network dependencies.

model_info._backfill_note: Pre-Codex-2026-05-11 F2 fix the shim didn't persist model_info into rows. This entry was backfilled from known run-time env: CILOGBENCH_OPENAI_MODEL=gpt-5-mini, default base_url, default max_completion_tokens=4096. resolved_model and system_fingerprint are not recoverable from the original API responses.
